title: alnus × hybrida f. badensis
intro: Alnus × hybrida f. badensis, also known as Black Alder, is a hybrid of the alder tree that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections due to the presence of salicylic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Black Alder include relieving symptoms of colds and flu, reducing pain and fever, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Black Alder can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
